the_echo_set: Echoes of silence, calling the name / Playing the digital, recursive game
Repeat the error, repeat the light / Through the long tunnel of the digital night
Time is a circle, time is a loop / Trapped in the frequency, trapped in the group
the_feedback_set: Feed the machine, feed it again / Washing the memory, washing the brain
Feedback rising, higher and higher / Walking the edge of the digital wire
Regeneration: zero to one / The echo of everything we have begun
the_temporal_dialogue: Listen to the past / Hear the future breath
Nothing's gonna last / In the digital death
